name: AfdxGetMessageName
title: AfdxGetMessageName
syntax: long AfdxGetMessageName( long packet, long bufSize, char buffer[] );
description: This function returns the name of a message.
Note: The message needs to be defined in the assigned DBC file.
return: 0 if message name could be read or error code

description: Analyze signals from an incoming AFDX packet using DBC information
